steps.title: Fit the table first
steps.content: Use two points from the table. From $(1,11)$ to $(2,16)$, the slope is $$m=\frac{16-11}{2-1}=5.$$

steps.title: Read the equation
steps.content: Substitute $(1,11)$ into $y=mx+b$: $$11=5(1)+b,$$ so $b=6$. The equation is $$y=5x+6.$$ It checks in the table: $5(1)+6=11$ and $5(2)+6=16$.
